metadata.description: Central catalog, documentation hub, templates, and marketplace metadata for oaslananka agent tools across engineering, EDA, PCB, MCP, and developer automation workflows.

planned_plugins.name: kicad-pro
planned_plugins.description: KiCad EDA automation for AI agents through kicad-mcp: schematic, PCB, DRC, validation, and fabrication workflows.
planned_plugins.activation_requirement: Add .claude-plugin/plugin.json and tested KiCad-specific skills to the source repository before moving this entry to plugins.

planned_plugins.name: easyeda-pro
planned_plugins.description: EasyEDA automation for AI agents through easyeda-mcp-pro: project workflows, component search, design checks, and EDA assistance.
planned_plugins.activation_requirement: Add .claude-plugin/plugin.json and tested EasyEDA-specific skills to the source repository before moving this entry to plugins.

planned_plugins.name: zaptrace
planned_plugins.description: AI-native operating system for electronic design and agent-assisted EDA workflows.
planned_plugins.activation_requirement: Publish product-level plugin and skills when the Zaptrace public workflow is ready.

planned_plugins.name: a2amesh
planned_plugins.description: Agent-to-agent mesh workflows for connecting local and remote CLI agents through structured orchestration patterns.
planned_plugins.activation_requirement: Publish product-level plugin and agent skills when the distribution contract is stable.
